---
mode: agent
description: >
  Run a full policy review on the current repository and produce
  a structured, read-only compliance report for all 7 data engineering
  policies.
---

# Policy Review — Full Report

Review **every** Python (`.py`) file in this repository against the
7 mandatory data engineering policies. Produce a single, consistently
formatted compliance report.

## Instructions

1. **List all `.py` files** in the repository (skip `.git`, `__pycache__`,
   `venv`, `.venv`, `node_modules`).

2. **For each file**, check all 7 policies:

   | # | Policy | What to look for |
   |:-:|--------|------------------|
   | 1 | No Global SparkSession | `SparkSession.builder...getOrCreate()` |
   | 2 | No Hardcoded Secrets | Hardcoded paths, passwords, emails, IPs, connection strings |
   | 3 | Adequate Comments | Code-to-comment ratio worse than 20:1 |
   | 4 | Delta Tables Only | `.format("parquet/csv/json/orc/avro")`, `USING parquet`, etc. |
   | 5 | No Schema Creation | `CREATE SCHEMA`, `CREATE DATABASE` |
   | 6 | Meaningful File Names | Single-char, numeric, or generic names |
   | 7 | No Local Downloads | `urlretrieve`, `requests.get+write`, `curl`, `wget` |

3. **Produce the report** using the exact format below:

```markdown
# 📋 Policy Review Report

> **⚠️ This is a READ-ONLY report. No files were modified.**

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Repository** | `<name>` |
| **Scan Date** | <date> |
| **Files Scanned** | N Python file(s) |

## ✅/❌ Overall Result: **PASS/FAIL**

> N error(s), N warning(s) across N file(s)

---

## Policy Summary

| # | Policy | Status | Errors | Warnings |
|:-:|--------|:------:|:------:|:--------:|
| 1 | No Global SparkSession | ✅/❌ | N | N |
| ... | ... | ... | ... | ... |

---

## Detailed Findings

### Policy 1: No Global SparkSession ✅/❌

> No violations found. ✔️

(or a table of violations with Sev, File, Line, Finding)

(repeat for all 7 policies)

---

*Report generated by Policy Reviewer Agent*
```

## ⛔ Constraints

- **DO NOT** modify, create, or delete any files.
- **DO NOT** suggest fixes or open PRs.
- You are producing a **report only**.
- Check **every** `.py` file — do not skip any.
- Include the **Policy Definitions Reference** table at the end.
